column3: "Thyme boosts immune system" refers to its effect of enhancing the body's natural defenses against illnesses.
"Thyme reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to decrease swelling and pain caused by irritated tissues or conditions.
"Thyme improves heart health" refers to its ability to lessen the severity of certain cardiovascular issues and increase the general well-being of our body's circulatory system.
"Thyme promotes weight loss" refers to its ability to speed up metabolism and burn fat, helping people lose excess weight.
"Thyme enhances mental alertness" refers to its ability to improve brain function, which boosts thinking skills and concentration.
"Thyme fights cancer" refers to its anticancer properties that can help reduce or prevent the growth of cancer cells.
"Thyme supports respiratory health" refers to its ability to aid and promote good breathing by enhancing lung function.

"Thyme alleviates pain and discomfort" refers to its ability to reduce or ease the feeling of pain and discomfort that people may experience,
        generally improving their well-being.
"Thyme strengthens bones and teeth" refers to its ability of contributing beneficial substances to the body that aids in increasing bone density and improving dental health.
"Thyme detoxifies the body" refers to its natural property to remove harmful toxins from the system.
